aboutMe.1: Web developer with commercial experience building frontend and fullstack web applications. I work with React, JavaScript, HTML/CSS and backend integration (REST API, PHP, SQL). I have delivered commercial projects – from web applications for businesses to online stores and data management solutions.
aboutMe.2: Alongside development, I gain experience as a web development and Python instructor, which allows me to communicate technical concepts clearly and understand the needs of diverse audiences. I have worked both independently – leading projects from concept to deployment – and in teams, including international environments.
aboutMe.3: I constantly seek opportunities to develop my skills, gain new experience, and broaden my horizons in web application development.

places.description: Development internship – building Windows Forms applications in an English‑speaking international team.

Frontend.CSS: I can style websites using both native CSS and the SCSS preprocessor. I am proficient in creating responsive web pages and familiar with the Bootstrap library.
Frontend.HTML: I am familiar with and can use many HTML elements such as lists, tables, and many more. I also understand meta tags and can create well-structured web pages, for example, by following the BEM methodology.
Frontend.JS: I know the syntax and built-in functions of JavaScript (loops, arrays, conditional statements, basic object-oriented concepts). I can manipulate the DOM using standard JavaScript or jQuery, render the DOM using JSON data fetched from a public API.

Backend.PHP: I know PHP and use it to connect websites to databases, handle SQL queries, and implement server-side logic.
Backend.SQL: I can use SQL commands such as SELECT, UPDATE, WHERE, and JOIN. I know how to filter, sort, and join data. I am capable of integrating a database with a web application.
Backend.Python: I know Python syntax and its built-in functions – loops, list operations, file handling, and writing my own functions.
Backend.Java: I know Java syntax and object-oriented programming. I have created projects with a windowed interface using the Swing library.
Backend.CPP: I know C++ syntax and functions. I can handle file operations and know object-oriented programming.
Backend.REST: I can fetch and send data via REST API (fetch, JSON). I have worked with public APIs as well as internal APIs in commercial projects.

skills.React: I am proficient in working with the React library – I create functional components, manage state (useState, useEffect), apply routing, and write modular JSX code. A good example of my React work is this website, built with React and React-Bootstrap. I used Vite as the build tool.

OtherSkills: Github - knowledge of the platform and related console commands
Postman - knowledge of the tool for testing and exploring REST APIs
Photoshop - knowledge of the program and the ability to modify graphics
Courses: PCAP: Programming Essentials in Python (Cisco Networking Academy)
Udemy: Zaawansowane projekty w CSS i JavaScript (Samuraj Programowania)
INF.02 and INF.03 exams (vocational qualifications – IT Technician)

SWAPI.title: Star Wars API
SWAPI.description: Site that gets data from API and puts it on the table, made with JavaScript and Bootstrap.
SWAPI.description2: Site that gets data from API and puts them into dynamically generated table. I made it with JavaScript and for styling I used Bootstrap. Project was made to show my abilities in working with public API. Website has menu in which you can choose if you want to get information about characters, or planets from Star Wars universe.

ticTacToe.title: React Tic-Tac-Toe
ticTacToe.description: Tic-Tac-Toe game made in react for two persons.
ticTacToe.description2: Basic Tic Tac Toe game for two persons that I made in React. It uses basic things that comes with React like states. I added history of players moves under game board.

nightSky.title: Night Sky
nightSky.description: Small canvas project that shows night sky with stars and random generated constellations.
nightSky.description2: Small canvas project that shows night sky with stars and randomly generated constellations with them. For this project I was mainly using canvas with JavaScript.

qaDashboard.title: QA Analytics Dashboard
qaDashboard.description: Commercial web application for visualizing automated test results – charts, filters, and reports for a QA team.
qaDashboard.description2: Web application built on commission for a company, used to monitor and visualize automated test results. Allows browsing data from multiple projects and test runs in one place – charts, filters, reports. Data is fetched dynamically from a REST API in JSON format.

ecommerceTrailers.title: E-commerce Store – Trailer Sales
ecommerceTrailers.description: Commercial online store deployed on Shopify with custom theme and JavaScript logic.
ecommerceTrailers.description2: Online store built for a client on the Shopify platform. I was responsible for the entire frontend – theme customization, JavaScript logic, responsiveness, and integration with the order management system. The project included a product database and an admin panel.

wordle.title: Wordle (game clone)
wordle.description: Clone of the popular word game implemented in Java with a windowed interface.
wordle.description2: Implementation of the Wordle game in Java – game logic, windowed interface (Swing), object-oriented programming. I plan to create an improved, web-based version of this game that will be linked here.

hero.subtitle: Most customers search Google before visiting a business. I'll help you get online - fast, without unnecessary formalities and at a lower price than an agency.

cards.desc: Dark background, clean lines - great for service companies, clinics, law firms.
Warm colours, large photos - ideal for restaurants, cafés, shops.
Little text, lots of space - suits photographers, architects, freelancers.
